subject: A small Phyrexian bird-horror with a sleek metallic body, elongated needle-like beak, and translucent humming insect-style wings, hovering in mid-air near a polished metal surface
description: A delicate Phyrexian construct shaped like a hummingbird hovers in profile, its body a smooth bluish-chrome carapace with biomechanical detailing. The wings are blurred with motion, rendered as translucent membranes that catch the light. A long needle beak juts forward. The background is a haze of icy blues and steel grays, suggesting a cold metallic Phyrexian environment with a polished curved structure occupying the lower portion of the frame. The composition is intimate and focused, almost like a nature illustration of a corrupted machine creature.
foreground: Phyrexian hummingbird in flight with blurred wings and needle beak
background: cold hazy metallic environment with a polished curved surface
emotion: alert, focused, predatory stillness in motion
